style_presets.flat-duotone: flat duotone illustration, two-tone fill, clean geometric shapes, transparent background
style_presets.line-art: minimal line art, uniform stroke weight, no fill, transparent background
style_presets.paper-cut: paper-cut style with layered silhouettes, subtle drop shadow between layers, transparent background
style_presets.iso-geometric: small isometric scene, clean geometric primitives, single accent color, transparent background

negative_prompt_common: cute mascot, cartoon character, kawaii, chibi, white background, photo of people, text, letters, typography, numbers, logo text, watermark, photorealistic

svg_export.color_preservation_note: potrace preserves silhouette only; duotone is flattened to single path. Keep originals.
